learnings.question: Which PCIe power management state results in a device being almost completely powered down, offering the maximum power savings but requiring the longest time to wake up?
learnings.learning: The L2 state is the deepest sleep mode in PCIe power management, where the device is almost completely powered down to achieve the highest power savings at the cost of the longest wake-up time.
learnings.articleTitle: Power Management States in the context of PCIe

learnings.question: Which of the following roles is commonly mistaken as a key position in Scrum but is actually not one of the three official roles defined by the framework?
learnings.learning: A common structural pitfall is assuming traditional project management roles exist in Scrum; however, the framework officially defines only three key roles: the Product Owner, the Scrum Master, and the Developers.

learnings.question: In Surah Ar-Ra'd, what requirement is stated for Allah to change the condition of a people?
options: They must change what is in themselves
They must commit a sin or sever kinship ties
They must start a food business
learnings.learning: A central moral lesson from Surah Ar-Ra'd (13:11) is that personal responsibility is key to change, as Allah does not alter the condition of a people until they first change what is within themselves.
learnings.articleTitle: The Art of Qada’ and Qadr

learnings.question: In Islamic theology, which three primary roles define the core purpose of human existence?
options: Worshiping Allah, serving as caretakers of the Earth, and preparing for the Hereafter
Renouncing all earthly desires, living in complete isolation, and rejecting free will
Achieving physical immortality, seeking political dominance, and eliminating moral accountability
Amassing material wealth, pursuing personal fame, and avoiding societal responsibilities
learnings.learning: In Islamic theology, human life is defined by three fundamental purposes: worshiping Allah, acting as caretakers (khalifah) of the Earth, and navigating earthly life as a test of conduct to prepare for the Hereafter.

learnings.question: Which cognitive method is required to actively force recall and prevent forgetting roughly 80% of what is learned within 24 hours?
options: Storing notes on a static digital board
Simply writing ideas down without a reminder system
learnings.learning: To successfully retain information and combat forgetfulness, passive re-reading and note-dumping are insufficient; you must implement an active recall system, such as interactive quizzing, to force memory retrieval.
learnings.articleTitle: Is Your Brain the Worst Place to Store Ideas? Why I Built a Second One
